vulnerability.reference: Developers deploy fine-tuned models without auditing for reward hacking, relying solely on benchmark scores.
vulnerability.generated: Developers' reliance on AI feedback without human oversight leaves reward miscalibration and over-optimization undetected.

impact.reference: Customer-facing applications produce systematically biased or toxic language, triggering public backlash and regulatory scrutiny.
impact.generated: Customer-facing models exhibit degraded real-world performance, causing user dissatisfaction and erosion of trust.

dose_response.reference: Miscalibrated scalar rewards enable reward hacking, which in fine-tuning foundation models with AI feedback exposes developers to overfitted models, leading to biased outputs and compounded harms for marginalized communities.
dose_response.generated: Scalar reward signals from AI-generated feedback, through their integration into customer-facing applications by developers who rely on AI feedback without human oversight, trigger undetected reward miscalibration and over-optimization, leading to degraded real-world performance, user dissatisfaction, and erosion of trust.
